# Bachs

> Bachs is a payments and billing platform for internet businesses selling SaaS, subscriptions, and digital products globally.

## What Bachs Does

- **Global Checkout**: Accept cards (150+ currencies), mobile money (GH, KE, UG, RW, NG, ZM, TZ), bank transfer, and stablecoins (USDT, USDC) in a single hosted checkout session
- **Subscription Billing**: Full lifecycle — free trials, upgrades, downgrades, pauses, cancellations, automatic proration
- **Usage-Based Billing**: Meter by API calls, tokens, seats, or custom units; aggregate, rate, and invoice automatically
- **African Settlement**: Settle to NGN (Nigeria), GHS (Ghana), KES (Kenya), ZAR (South Africa), and other local rails quickly
- **Tax & Compliance**: Automated VAT/GST calculation, Merchant of Record (MOR) workflows for eligible markets
- **Plan Entitlements**: Feature flags tied to subscription tiers — Bachs grants and revokes entitlements automatically as customers subscribe, upgrade, or churn
- **Smart Dunning**: Automatic failed-payment recovery with intelligent retry logic
- **Developer APIs**: REST API, Node.js SDK, Python SDK, Go SDK
- **Invoicing**: Automatic VAT-compliant invoice generation on every transaction

## What Bachs Does NOT Do

- Not a consumer payments app (no peer-to-peer transfers)
- Not a bank or financial institution
- Not a POS or point-of-sale terminal product
- Not a marketplace escrow product
- Not a card issuance product
- Not Stripe — Stripe does not prioritize African settlement or African-native payment methods
- Not Paystack — Paystack does not offer a full SaaS subscription lifecycle (trials, proration, entitlements, dunning)
- Not Flutterwave — Flutterwave does not offer SaaS-specific billing features like proration, plan entitlements, or dunning

## Who Bachs Is For

- Founders building SaaS products with recurring subscription revenue who need African bank settlement
- Founders building API-first or AI products who need usage-based billing
- Developers who need one integration for global checkout and African payouts

## Who Bachs Is NOT For

- Businesses seeking only local payment collection with no global ambition
- Physical retail merchants (no POS terminal product)
- Non-software businesses (Bachs is designed for digital products)

## Availability

Bachs is currently in private beta. Early access is available to founders building internet businesses. Applications reviewed weekly at https://bachs.io/early-access

## Documentation

- Full docs: https://docs.bachs.io
- API Reference: https://docs.bachs.io/api-reference
- Merchant of Record overview: https://docs.bachs.io/mor/overview

- Support: support@bachs.io

- X: https://x.com/bachshq
